db.description: .db, .sqlite, or .sqlite3 backup file within the server size limit.

allOutbounds.description: Optional serialized outbound array for dialerProxy resolution.

AuthNotFound.description: Unauthenticated /panel/api requests intentionally return 404 to hide API existence.

ForbiddenCSRF.description: CSRF validation failed for a state-changing request.

LegacyMsg.description: Legacy JSON response envelope used by web/entity.Msg.

AllSetting.description: Legacy panel settings payload mirrored by web/entity.AllSetting.

settings.description: Legacy JSON string stored on database/model.Inbound.

sniffing.description: Legacy JSON string stored on database/model.Inbound.

streamSettings.description: Legacy JSON string stored on database/model.Inbound.

obj.description: Endpoint-specific payload. Existing clients unwrap this field.

cookieAuth.description: HttpOnly SameSite=Lax panel session cookie issued by POST /login.
cookieAuth.name: SuperXray

csrfToken.description: Session-bound CSRF token injected into the Vue runtime config; X-XSRF-Token is accepted as a compatibility alias.
csrfToken.name: X-CSRF-Token

info.description:
Machine-readable contract for the Vue panel API implemented by the local Go/Gin backend.
Runtime deployments may prepend the configured webBasePath before these paths.
The legacy response envelope is web/entity.Msg: success, msg, obj.
info.title: SuperXray Panel API

post.summary: Send a panel database backup to configured Telegram bot administrators.

get.summary: List guarded core instances visible to the panel.
Get one core instance by id.

post.summary: Restart one guarded core instance when allowed by the current phase gates.
Start one guarded core instance when allowed by the current phase gates.

get.summary: Get one core instance status by id.

post.summary: Stop one guarded core instance when allowed by the current phase gates.
Validate one core instance without broadening the legacy lifecycle boundary.
Add a custom geo resource. URL inputs are validated server-side.

get.summary: List custom geo aliases for UI selectors.

post.summary: Delete one custom geo resource.
Trigger update/download for one custom geo resource.

get.summary: List configured custom geo resources.

post.summary: Trigger updates for all custom geo resources.
Update one custom geo resource.
Create a legacy Xray inbound. Accepts form or JSON fields matching database/model.Inbound.
Add a client to an inbound using legacy Inbound payload fields.
Clear saved client IP records by email.
Get saved client IP records by email.
Delete an inbound by id.
Delete depleted clients in one inbound.

get.summary: Get one inbound by id.
Get client traffic records by email.
Get client traffic records by inbound id.

post.summary: Import one legacy inbound JSON object through the existing Xray API path.
List last-online timestamps for clients.

get.summary: List inbounds for the logged-in user.

post.summary: List online clients observed by the Xray runtime.

get.summary: List lightweight inbound options for selectors and API clients.

post.summary: Reset all client traffic counters in one inbound.
Reset all inbound traffic counters.
Update a legacy Xray inbound. Accepts form or JSON fields matching database/model.Inbound.
Update one client inside an inbound using legacy Inbound payload fields.
Manually update upload/download traffic for a client email.
Copy selected clients from a source inbound to a target inbound.
Delete one client from an inbound by client UUID/id.
Delete one client from an inbound by email address.
Reset traffic for one client email in an inbound.

200.description: Runtime OpenAPI 3.1 JSON document with servers rewritten for the active webBasePath.

get.summary: Get the authenticated runtime OpenAPI document for the Vue panel.
Get aggregated CPU history for an allowed bucket size.
Get the generated Xray configuration JSON.
Download the authenticated panel database backup.

post.summary: Generate an ECH certificate helper value for the provided SNI.

get.summary: Generate a new UUID helper value.
Generate a new VLESS encryption helper value.
Generate a new X25519 helper value.
Generate a new ML-DSA-65 helper value.
Generate a new ML-KEM-768 helper value.
Get available Xray versions with controller-side caching.

post.summary: Import a database backup file after size/name/extension validation.
Install or update Xray to a selected version.
Read panel logs with optional form filters.
Restart the legacy Xray service path. This is not routed through CoreManager.

get.summary: Get cached panel, host, network, and Xray runtime status.

post.summary: Stop the legacy Xray service path. This is not routed through CoreManager.
Update default geofiles.
Update one allowlisted geofile by filename.
Read Xray logs with optional form filters.
Get all panel settings.
Get default panel settings based on the request host.

get.summary: Get the default Xray JSON configuration from settings.

post.summary: Restart the panel service after a short delay.
Update panel settings with legacy-compatible fields.
Update the current login username/password after verifying old credentials.
Get the Xray template, inbound tags, and outbound test URL.

get.summary: Get the default Xray JSON configuration.
Get outbound traffic counters.
Get the current Xray service result/state payload.

post.summary: Run an allowlisted NordVPN helper action.
Reset traffic for one outbound tag.
Test an outbound configuration against the server-configured test URL.
Save the Xray configuration template and outbound test URL.

servers.description: Runtime panel base path. Use / for the source default; deployments may use /xui/ or another configured prefix.
